testcase.name: logOutMember_SuccessfulLogout_ReturnsNewGuestToken
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.069 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempting log out user ID: 1... 15:30:54.069 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempt to create a new guest session... 15:30:54.069 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Successfully created guest session!! 15:30:54.069 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- user ID 1 successfully logged out

testcase.name: logOutMember_UserDoesNotExistInDB_ReturnsFailResult

testcase.name: loginMember_UserDoesNotExist_ReturnsFailResult

failure.message: iRepository.findByID(<any string>); Never wanted here: -> at com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginServiceTests.loginMember_UserDoesNotExist_ReturnsFailResult(UserLoginServiceTests.java:135) But invoked here: -> at com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService.loginMember(UserLoginService.java:44) with arguments: [999]

testcase.failure:
org.mockito.exceptions.verification.NeverWantedButInvoked:
iRepository.findByID(<any string>); Never wanted here: -> at com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginServiceTests.loginMember_UserDoesNotExist_ReturnsFailResult(UserLoginServiceTests.java:135) But invoked here: -> at com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService.loginMember(UserLoginService.java:44) with arguments: [999]

Error: User not found java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: User not found at com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService.loginMember(UserLoginService.java:44) at testcase.name: loginMember_ValidCredentials_ReturnsOkResult
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.075 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempting login for user ID: ... 15:30:54.076 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- user ID 1 successfully logged in

testcase.name: logOutMember_TokenIsNotUserToken_ReturnsFailResult
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.076 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempting log out user ID: 0... 15:30:54.076 [main] WARN com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Logout failed: the session want of user for ID 0

testcase.name: createGuestSession_ServiceThrowsException_ReturnsFailResult
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.076 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempt to create a new guest session... 15:30:54.076 [main] ERROR com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Failed to create guest session. testcase.name: logOutMember_MalformedTokenException_ReturnsFailResult

testcase.name: loginMember_WrongPassword_ReturnsFailResult
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.078 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempting login for user ID: ... 15:30:54.078 [main] WARN com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Login failed: invalid password and email attempt for user ID 1

testcase.name: createGuestSession_Success_ReturnsOkResult
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.078 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempt to create a new guest session... 15:30:54.078 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Successfully created guest session!!

testcase.name: loginMember_WrongEmail_ReturnsFailResult
testcase.system-out: 15:30:54.079 [main] INFO com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Attempting login for user ID: ... 15:30:54.079 [main] WARN com.group16b.ApplicationLayer.UserLoginService -- Login failed: invalid password and email attempt for user ID 1
